message:
Extract error tracking from ValidateCtx into separate handler

Move error-tracking logic out of ValidateCtx to clarify its purpose.
ValidateCtx was confusingly both inheriting from diagnostic_handler AND
wrapping one. Now ValidateCtx is purely a context for argument access,
while error_tracking_handler handles error detection at the call site.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
